work_unit: M-001-position: avg_cost includes buy-side fees → misleading unrealized PnL (direction-shift from audit-2026-07-07-028)
situation: apply_buy_trade received total_cost = price*qty + fee.total, inflating avg_cost. mark() uses avg_cost for unrealized_pnl = (last_price - avg_cost) * qty, which is understated immediately after purchase. Cash accounting in settle_buy_fill already deducts fees separately — double-counting.
action: Pass gross_trade_cost = round4(trade_price * fill_quantity) (ex-fees) to apply_buy_trade instead of total_cost. Added comment explaining the rationale. Edited directly in diverged worktree opt-moni-engine-1783358963 (cp-guard triggered because prior M-003-engine fix was unmerged on same file).
outcome_evidence: Commit fcd13a3 on auto/opt-moni-engine-1783358963 pushed to origin. Diff: 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-). gross_trade_cost replaces total_cost in apply_buy_trade call at engine.rs:686-692.
